nasb.text: and he *said, ‘Cornelius, your prayer has been heard and your alms have been remembered before God.

esv.text: and said, ‘Cornelius, your prayer has been heard and your alms have been remembered before God.

cnv.text: 說：‘哥尼流，你的禱告已蒙垂聽，你的善行在　神面前已蒙記念。

ccb.text: 说，‘哥尼流，上帝已经垂听了你的祷告，也悦纳你周济穷人的善行。

csbs.text: 说‘哥尼流，你的祷告已蒙垂听，你的施舍已经在神面前蒙记念了。
